source.reference: FN SS190 31gr @ 715 m/s (263mm barrel). G7 BC ~0.090. Steel-core AP bullet (penetrates CRISAT at 200m). Alternative loading: SS197SR 40gr @ 520 m/s (sporting load).
source.methodology: Values sourced from manufacturer published ballistic data.

projectile.notes: PDW/pistol round — high velocity light projectile, steel core for armor piercing
